headline: Enshittification
summary: A food broker experienced severe cyclospora illness. The outbreak caused explosive diarrhea and other symptoms. This highlights serious foodborne health risks.

headline: Something's glowing on the Pixel 11's camera bar
summary: Google's new Pixel 11 teaser reveals a glowing, color-shifting orb. The unique camera bar feature was shown in a brief video. It hints at a fresh design element for the upcoming phone.

headline: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
summary: Suno AI was exposed for scraping millions of songs and lyrics. A hack revealed its training data sources included YouTube Music and Deezer. This uncovers Suno's undisclosed data acquisition practices.

headline: Lucid’s bankruptcy rumor is a bad sign for the EV future
summary: Lucid Motors denied recent bankruptcy rumors. The unconfirmed reports caused its stock price to plunge. Lucid maintains sufficient cash flow to operate into the next year.

headline: Fourth Wing Author Rebecca Yarros Announces Threshing Day, New Book in Empyrean Series
summary: Rebecca Yarros announced 'Threshing Day', a new book in her Empyrean series. The author of 'Fourth Wing' expands her popular fantasy world. Fans eagerly await the latest installment.

headline: Pick up a Big and Tall Gaming Chair for Less Than $140 With Free Shipping on Amazon
summary: A big and tall gaming chair is available for under $140. The Amazon deal includes convenient free shipping. It offers an affordable option for gamers seeking comfort.

headline: Fallout: New Vegas Lead Designer Chris Avellone Admits He Feels 'Embarrassed' by TV Show's Dialogue
summary: Chris Avellone, 'Fallout: New Vegas' lead designer, expressed embarrassment. He cited issues with dialogue in the 'Fallout' TV series adaptation. His comments stirred discussion among fans.

headline: Stranger Than Heaven: Here’s What Comes in Each Edition
summary: Preorders are live for 'Stranger Than Heaven', a new 'Yakuza' spin-off. The game features a story spanning 50 years. Details on special edition content are now available.

headline: Starmer says it's the 'end of my political journey' at his final Prime Minister's Questions
summary: MPs from all parties paid tribute to a departing Prime Minister. The final PMQs featured jokes and shared anecdotes. It marked a significant transition in the House of Commons.

headline: Iain Watson: Burnham faces crucial choice for chancellor as battle for No 11 continues
summary: Iain Watson highlights Andy Burnham's critical decision for chancellor. This appointment will signal Burnham's strategic intentions. The competition for the No 11 role remains intense.

headline: French MPs approve assisted dying law with strict rules after years of argument
summary: French MPs passed a new assisted dying law. It applies to terminally ill adults meeting strict criteria. This marks a landmark legal decision after years of debate.

headline: Man arrested over social media post threatening to shoot Farage
summary: A man was arrested over online threats to Nigel Farage. Police apprehended the suspect in south London. The post allegedly threatened to shoot the MP.
